test_design.single_variable_change: Prompt/request anchor text only. Seed, control image, ControlNet strength, and ControlNet end percent were retained from the preferred local candidate.

improvements_over_prior_failed_antidrift: The subject-anchor retry restores a young body male presentation compared with the prior negative-only anti-drift output.
Hair is short and black rather than long, gray, or feminine-styled.
The shirt/blazer clothing route remains coherent and the right-edge artifact is not severe.
regressions_against_retained_candidate: The face shape, eye styling, nose, and overall identity still drift from the retained preferred candidate.
Hair becomes too uniformly helmet-like and less naturally textured than the retained sample.
The flat neutral gray background request is not preserved; the retry shifts to a cooler blue gradient.
Framing/crop changes enough that this is not a clean retained-candidate improvement.
Eyes are darker and less naturally lit than the retained sample.
anatomy_and_artifact_review: Visible head, neck, shoulders, blazer, and shirt are anatomically coherent.
No visible hands are present, so hand/finger QA is not applicable to this artifact.
No text, watermark, hard right-edge seam, or obvious control-map line stain is visible.
Skin texture is plausible but less faithful to the retained candidate identity.

qa_decision.helped_specific_failure_scope: gender presentation and short-hair anchoring improved compared with the prior negative-only anti-drift sample
qa_decision.decision: Do not promote the subject-anchor retry. Retain the 0.42/0.60 seed711570106 preferred sample as the best local candidate while treating prompt-only identity anchoring as insufficient.
qa_decision.next_local_recommendation: Stop prompt-only anti-drift retries for MOD-17 Canny unless a new reference/identity-conditioning workflow path is added. The current Canny-only lane can produce plausible portraits but is not identity-robust.

remaining_blockers: broader MOD-17 certification gates remain separate from this local quality loop
